title: Possibility to filter on "starts with"
excerpt:
We would benefit from having more options in the filter choices. In addition to “contains”, “is”, “is not”, etc, we would like the options “starts with” and “ends with.”

posts.author: JessicaA (Jessica Arhammar)
posts.cookedHtml:
We would benefit from having more options in the filter choices. In addition to “contains”, “is”, “is not”, etc, we would like the options “starts with” and “ends with.”
An example: We have a text column with year and issue number (YYNN) where I want to be able to filter all issues from the year '16. If I use “contains” 16 in the filter, the results will not only include 1603, but also 2516.
